title: Blup Blob
description: A bouncy puzzle platformer adventure. Help Blup Blob navigate through challenging levels filled with colorful obstacles and clever puzzles.

title: Digit Crush
description: A number-crunching puzzle game that tests your math skills and strategic thinking. Match digits, clear the board, and aim for the high score.

title: Dud OS
description: A quirky operating system simulator. Explore a fictional OS filled with mini-games, easter eggs, and unexpected surprises at every click.

title: Fok N' Roll
description: A high-energy rhythm game that blends rock music with fast-paced gameplay. Hit the right notes at the right time and rock the stage.

title: Hack N' Dough
description: Hack systems and earn dough in this cyberpunk-themed action strategy game. Plan your hacks carefully and stay ahead of the security systems.

title: HAR
description: An atmospheric adventure that takes you on a journey through mysterious landscapes. Uncover secrets, solve puzzles, and discover the story of HAR.

title: Injected
description: A fast-paced action game where you fight against a system that's been compromised. Inject your way through security layers and take down the corruption.

title: Is There A Game?
description: A meta-experimental game that questions what a game really is. Is there a game here? Only one way to find out.

title: Magical Vein
description: Delve into a magical world where mystical veins of power run through the land. Craft spells, battle creatures, and uncover ancient secrets.

title: Masquerade Survivors
description: Survive the masquerade! Battle through waves of masked enemies in this vampire-survivors-inspired action game with unique characters and abilities.

title: Rock Unroll
description: Rock and roll! A physics-based puzzle game where you guide a boulder through intricate levels, using momentum and gravity to reach the goal.

title: Sudo Mice
description: sudo make me a puzzle! A clever terminal-themed puzzle game where mice execute commands to navigate through increasingly complex mazes.

title: Tetrabros
description: The classic block-stacking puzzle reimagined by the bros. A fresh take on tetromino gameplay with unique twists and multiplayer action.

title: The Forking Path
description: Every choice forks the path. A narrative-driven adventure where your decisions shape the story in unexpected ways. How many endings will you find?
